resources.string: Please fill in all required fields.
Any additional details about the engagement
Please fill in all required fields for the engagement.
How often does this engagement occur?
On specific days of the week
Invalid time format. Please use HH:mm.
Invalid date format. Please use YYYY-MM-DD.
End date cannot be before start date.
Please select at least one day of the week.
Please select how often this engagement occurs.
Please fill in all assignment details.
Estimated time must be greater than 0.
Are you sure you want to delete assignment %1$s\nof subject %2$s due on %3$s?\nThis cannot be undone.
Please fill in all exam details.\nIf venue is not known, put TBD\n or To Be Decided
Exam start time must be before end time.
No events found for this day.
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"?
Are you sure you want to delete %1$d\nselected timetables?
What would you like to do with\nthis timetable?
Failed to perform action on timetable: %1$s
No archived timetables available to activate.
No archived timetables available to delete.
Your assignment %1$s for %2$s is due on %3$s at %4$s.
Your exam for %1$s is on %2$s at %3$s.
Your class for %1$s is at %2$s in %3$s.
The timetable "%1$s" has been archived\nas its validity period ended.
The ad-hoc engagement "%1$s" has been automatically\ndeleted as its validity period ended.
The exam for "%1$s" has been automatically deleted\nas it has passed.

Welcome to TimetableApp! This app helps you manage your academic and personal schedules.

 Main Screen:
 - Upload Timetable: Import your lecture, lab, or tutorial schedules from a CSV file. The app will prompt you for validity dates and default notification settings.
 - Add Engagement / Meeting: Create one-off or recurring personal engagements (e.g., meetings, appointments) that are not part of a formal timetable.
 - View Assignment/Deliverable/WorkItems: See a list of all your assignments, their due dates, estimated completion time, and current progress. You can add, edit, or delete assignments.
 - View Exams: See a list of all your upcoming exams, their dates, times, and venues. You can add, edit, or delete exams.
 - Timetable Entries: Your active timetables, assignments, and exams will be listed here. Tap on a timetable to see its details (class sessions).
 - Floating Action Button (+): Quickly add a new ad-hoc engagement.
 - 3-dot Menu: Access additional options:
 - See Clashes: View potential time conflicts between your scheduled events for a selected day.
 - See Schedule: Get a detailed hourly view of your events for a selected day.
 - Delete Archived Timetables: Permanently delete timetables that have been archived.
 - My Profile: Configure your name, alias, and global notification preferences for different event types.
 - Help: Access this help guide.

 Timetable Details:
 - Displays the class sessions for a selected timetable. You can set individual notification offsets or silence notifications for specific sessions.
 - The "Silence All Notifications" checkbox at the top allows you to mute all notifications for that entire timetable.

 Notifications:
 - The app schedules notifications to remind you of upcoming classes, engagements, assignments, and exams based on your preferences.
 - Ensure you grant notification permissions when prompted.

 Cleanup Worker:
 - The app automatically archives old timetables and deletes expired ad-hoc engagements and exams to keep your data tidy. You will receive notifications about these actions.

 For any issues or feedback, please contact support.
How often does this engagement/meeting occur?
Are you sure you want to delete the exam : %1$s\nscheduled on %2$s?\nThis cannot be undone.
Encountered error while deleting\nthe exam due to %1$s
Your engagement \"%1$s\" is deleted\nbecause it is past its end date.
No active timetables found. Upload or add one!
Parsed and saved %1$d class sessions for timetable: %2$s
What would you like to do with timetable "%1$s"?
Are you sure you want to delete timetable "%1$s"?\nAll associated class sessions will also be deleted.\nThis action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete the engagement "%1$s"?\nThis action cannot be undone.
Failed to delete selected archived timetables: %1$s

Are you sure you want to delete the following archived timetables?

%1$s

This action cannot be undone.
CSV parsed, but no valid class sessions found.
End date cannot be before start date.
Are you sure you want to delete this "%1$s" ?\nThis action cannot be undone.
Notes about the To-Do (Helps in search)
This To-Do is past the due date.\\nYou can edit and move the due date and time.
To-Do could NOT be saved due to:\n%1$s
To-Do could not be updated due to :\n%1$s
Are you sure that you want to delete %1$s ?\n This action cannot be undone.
Could not delete To-Do item due to :\n%1$s
This To-Do item has been completed.\nWELL DONE !
This To-Do item is pending.\nDo you want to keep it as-is or update the % completed\\nor delete it ?
To-Do item with Due Date %1$s\nand Due Time %2$s
You are exiting before saving. Are you sure you do NOT want to save this ?
Are you sure you want to exit without saving the Engagement/Meeting ?
Are you sure you want to exit without saving the changes in the Engagement/Meeting ?
Are you sure you want to exit without saving the Exam ?
Are you sure you want to exit without saving the changes in the Exam ?
Are you sure you want to exit without saving the Assignment ?
Are you sure you want to exit without saving the changes in the Assignment ?
Do you want to save this audio note?
Are you sure you want to exit this Note without saving ?
Note could not be saved due to %1$s
Are you sure you want to delete %1$s ? This action cannot be undone.
The note was last modified on %1$s
The note has been updated successfully\n
"End date cannot be earlier than start date "
No days selected. You must select a day
The subtask has no parent event
Are you sure you want to delete the subtask %1$s ?
There are no other events to copy subtasks from
Did not select a valid event
Select the specific event to copy tasks from
Short Task Sentences. Separate with full-stops. Or semi-colon.
Choose a specific event to copy from
e.g., Financial Statement, How to proceed ahead…
Choose a specific event to copy from
No other Events to copy from
Are you sure you want to delete the action %1$s ? This cannot be undone
Start date and time is mandatory
End datetime cannot be before Start datetime
Read Case Study, Call cab, Do To-Do ABC
Give some details about the Action (Optional)
Start Date cannot be in the past
Start time cannot be in the past
Due Date cannot be in the past
Submission Time cannot be in the past
Due Date and Time cannot be in the past
Search Exam Venue eg Physics Hall1
Start Date cannot be in the past
Start Time cannot be in the past
Exam Start Date and Time cannot be in the past
Please select a location on the map first
Exam Date cannot be in the past
Start time cannot be in the past
End Time cannot be in the past
Exam Location is mandatory (Put TBD if not sure)
Date Time cannot be in the past
Date time cannot be in the past
Due Datetime cannot be in the past
Due Datetime cannot be in the past
Due Datetime cannot be in the past
Due Datetime cannot be in the past
Due Datetime cannot be in the past
End Date cannot be before Start Date
End time cannot be before Start Time
Start Datetime cannot be in the past
Type(s) of note cannot be empty
Topic of note cannot be empty
Start time cannot be in the past.
Engagement end time cannot be before start time.
Start date cannot be in the past.
End date cannot be before start date.
Please select at least one day for specific days of week.
Engagement cannot end in the past.
Start Time cannot be in the past
Silence Notifications for this Exam (Careful. Use with Caution)
You have a ToDo item:\\n\n%1$s : %2$s\\n\nDue on : %3$s at %4$s
Duration must be greater than 0 minutes.
Notification time must be 0 or greater.
Change Timezone to match the time-table timings
Currently, there are no active timetables.
